title: Deliver remote desktops and apps with Azure Virtual Desktop
summary: Azure Virtual Desktop on Microsoft Azure is a desktop and app virtualization service that runs on the cloud. Azure Virtual Desktop works across devices – including Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android – with full-featured apps that you can use to access remote desktops and apps.

sections.title: Deliver remote desktops and apps with Azure Virtual Desktop
sections.summary: Azure Virtual Desktop on Microsoft Azure is a desktop and app virtualization service that runs on the cloud. Azure Virtual Desktop works across devices – including Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android – with full-featured apps that you can use to access remote desktops and apps.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure Virtual Desktop to deliver remote desktop and remote app experiences in Microsoft Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/m365-wvd-intro/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Prepare for Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to prepare for Azure Virtual Desktop - a cloud-based virtualization solution running on Microsoft Azure. Azure Virtual Desktop is an elastically scalable service to deliver remote desktop and remote app experiences - without having to manage the underlying server infrastructure. Review the prerequisites and tools provided by Microsoft get ready to provision your first Azure Virtual Desktop host pool.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/m365-prepare-for-wvd/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Deploy Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy Azure Virtual Desktop and customize the workspace for your users.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/m365-deploy-wvd/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Optimize Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to optimize deployment and infrastructure costs using Azure Virtual Desktops native scaling tool Autoscale. Learn how to configure Autoscale so that session host VMs are only running when you need them to be.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/m365-optimize-wvd/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Secure an Azure Virtual Desktop deployment
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to Microsoft security capabilities that can help keep your applications and data secure in your Azure Virtual Desktop deployment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/m365-wvd-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure an Azure Virtual Desktop deployment

lessons.title: Deploy applications by using MSIX app attach for Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deliver applications by using MSIX app attach. MSIX app attach is an application delivery technology that separates applications and their state from the operating system and assigns applications to users dynamically.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/m365-wvd-application-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy applications by using MSIX app attach for Azure Virtual Desktop

lessons.title: Protect your Azure Virtual Desktop deployment by using Azure Firewall
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy and configure Azure Firewall to protect outbound network traffic for Azure Virtual Desktop.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/protect-virtual-desktop-deployment-azure-firewall/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Protect your Azure Virtual Desktop deployment by using Azure Firewall

lessons.title: Business continuity and disaster recovery for Azure Virtual Desktop
lessons.content_md:
Microsoft Azure Virtual Desktop is a cloud service that helps you give users a secure remote desktop that they can use anywhere. With Azure Virtual Desktop, you can plan appropriate business continuity and disaster recovery (BCDR) strategies to help protect against both unplanned and planned failures and to provide redundancy.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/business-continuity-disaster-recovery-azure-virtual-desktop/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Business continuity and disaster recovery for Azure Virtual Desktop

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deliver remote desktops and apps with Azure Virtual Desktop
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deliver remote desktops and apps with Azure Virtual Desktop**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
